queries: Best facial spa near Houston TX
action.query: Best facial spa near Houston TX

content.text:
Houston boasts a variety of exceptional facial spas catering to diverse skincare needs. Here are some top-rated options:

**[Sanctuary Spa](http://www.besanctuary.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Day spa · 4.8 (284 reviews)**  
_1701 S Shepherd Dr suite c, Houston, TX 77019_  
Established in 1984, Sanctuary Spa offers luxurious facials, therapeutic massages, and hydrotherapy services. Located at 1701 S. Shepherd, Suite C, they operate Monday through Friday from 9 am to 8 pm, Saturday from 9 am to 7 pm, and Sunday from 11 am to 5 pm.

**Houston, TX**  
**Closed · City**  
_Texas_  
This luxury medspa provides customized facials combining medical-grade skincare with a serene spa experience. Services include deep hydration, pore refinement, and anti-aging treatments. Located at 10927 Louetta Road, they are open Monday to Thursday from 9 am to 8 pm, and Friday to Saturday from 9 am to 5 pm.

**[Skin 101 Medical Spa](http://www.skin101houston.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Skin care clinic · 4.8 (178 reviews)**  
_11300 Katy Fwy B625, Houston, TX 77043_  
A full-service medical spa offering state-of-the-art aesthetic treatments, including facials, chemical peels, and injectables. Located at 11300 Katy Freeway, Suite B-625, they operate Tuesday to Saturday with varying hours.

**[Bare Necessities Spa & Boutique](https://bnwax.com?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Spa**  
_1643 Richmond Ave, Houston, TX 77006_  
Known for personalized facials, waxing, massages, and organic spray tanning, Bare Necessities provides a comprehensive spa experience. Located at 1643 Richmond Ave., they are open Monday to Friday from 9 am to 9 pm, and Saturday to Sunday from 10 am to 6 pm.

**Houston, TX**  
**Closed · City**  
_Texas_  
Offers a range of facial treatments, including anti-aging facials, HIFU face treatments, and microneedling with RF. They focus on advanced skincare solutions tailored to individual needs.

When selecting a facial spa, consider factors such as the specific treatments offered, the expertise of the staff, the quality of products used, and the overall ambiance to ensure a relaxing and effective experience.
